data.narrative:
Sunflower Labs is a Series B stage company in the Drones & Autonomous sector that has raised $41.7M to date. The relevant peer universe comprises eight private companies operating in drones and autonomous systems, including Elroy Air, Zipline, Joby Aviation, Nuro, and Archer Aviation. No public comparables exist in this narrow segment.

The Stage-Progression method is applicable and anchors valuation using the $42M total raised as a proxy for current fair value, applying a 1.9x step-up multiplier typical of Series B advancement. This yields an implied valuation of $79M. The Peer-Median method is not applicable due to insufficient data density: while five same-sector peers exist, none satisfy the narrow filtering criteria (same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar-tier valuations) required to generate a meaningful comparable set of three or more datapoints.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $67M to $91M, with a median point estimate of $79M. This range reflects a ±15% sensitivity around the stage-progression implied value. Key uncertainties include the limited peer dataset for cross-validation and the absence of public market benchmarks in autonomous systems, which constrains confidence in the step-up multiplier itself. Capital intensity and time-to-revenue inflection in this sector remain material variables not fully captured in raised-capital proxies.
